title: Create validation form requests
contract: Create 4 form request classes in app/Http/Requests/: 1. RegisterRequest.php: name required, email unique, password min 8 confirmed 2. LoginRequest.php: email required, password required 3. ResetPasswordRequest.php: password min 8 confirmed, not same as current 4. ChangePasswordRequest.php: current_password verified, password min 8 confirmed, password != current. Each class extends FormRequest. Implement rules() method with validation rules and messages() method with user-friendly error messages. Do NOT authorize in these classes (handle in controller).
